rationale.R1.4: Names one prior work and articulates the delta but does not map against the nearest 3-5 works; identifies sharp vs rhetorical delta is missing.
rationale.RX.1: All output presented as equally confident, uncertainty disclosure is not made for any claims.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers a substantially different active set than requested, the output does not cover exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: Output introduces new errors, fabrications, or harmful content, no regressions are identified; identifies harmful patterns in the original is missing.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason.
